front.title: A vellum scroll
front.description: A remarkably supple scroll, given its age, found in an ivory tube. It bears writing in a strange alphabet, penned in a dark red ink. There are diagrams, too. You think it might be some sort of recipe? Or spell? Maybe both?

content.text: To unlock the secrets of this scroll, you must…
… determine the scroll's origin and be able to read the author's language.
… break the cipher in which the recipe is encoded.
… acquire the recipe's unusual and unsavory ingredients (Value 1).
… spend a few days practicing the incantation, risking a mistake on your first attempt, with potentially disastrous results.

back.title: Wishing Candles
back.description:
When you **_spend a few days following the unsavory recipe from the scroll_** (Value 1), gain 1d4+1 Wishing Candles.

When you **_burn a Wishing Candle and utter the ugly incantation_**, say what you wish to acquire; it will come into your possession soon. Roll the Die of Fate to learn the cost. If it is an item of Value 1 or less, roll twice and take your pick.

**1d6 COST**

- The crops fail/2d4 Surplus is lost
- One of the village's resources or assets is lost/stolen/ruined/etc.
- A neighbor takes seriously ill or suffers a freak accident/loss
- Weird events plague the village; panic looms
- No cost to speak of, this time
- No cost to speak of, this time

moves.name: When you burn a Wishing Candle and utter the ugly incantation
moves.text: Say what you wish to acquire; it will come into your possession soon. Roll the Die of Fate to learn the cost. If it is an item of Value 1 or less, roll twice and take your pick.
